checks.name: Courtesy does NOT count trialing by default
QR endpoint route file exists and returns image/png
checks.detail: Route file at src/app/api/public/qr/referral/[code]/route.ts exists and contains image/png content type
checks.expected: Route exists at /api/public/qr/referral/[code] and returns image/png

checks.name: QR route uses qrcode library with toBuffer for PNG generation
checks.detail: Route imports QRCode and calls toBuffer() for PNG generation
checks.actual: QRCode library and toBuffer() both present

checks.name: Email invite route rejects non-approved instructors
checks.actual: Approved status check and 403 response both present

checks.name: Self-referral blocked in claim route
checks.detail: Claim route checks instructorUserId === user.id and returns user-friendly error
checks.expected: instructorUserId === user.id guard with rejection message
checks.actual: Self-referral guard and error message both present

checks.name: ConnectionSource values are exactly 4: referral_link, invite_link, student_search, admin
Email invite sends produce log event (logInviteEvent)
checks.detail: Email invite route imports and calls logInviteEvent
checks.expected: logInviteEvent imported and called in email invite route

checks.name: Admin metrics endpoint returns expected schema keys
checks.detail: Route at src/app/api/admin/quality/referrals/route.ts exists and contains all 6 expected response keys
checks.expected: Route exists with keys: connectionsBySource, identityCoverage, topReferrers, recentClaims, inviteEvents, courtesyBreakdown
checks.actual: Found 6/6 keys: [connectionsBySource, identityCoverage, topReferrers, recentClaims, inviteEvents, courtesyBreakdown]

checks.name: Feature flag gating: referral claim checks isInstructorFeatureEnabled
checks.detail: Claim route imports and checks isInstructorFeatureEnabled before processing
checks.expected: isInstructorFeatureEnabled imported and called in claim route
checks.actual: Feature flag check imported and called

checks.name: No certificate_number in public referral responses
checks.detail: Neither lookupByReferralCode nor lookupBySlug select certificate_number; ReferralLookup interface is clean
checks.expected: certificate_number absent from all public-facing selects and interfaces
